/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/rcdevice_unittest.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/rcdevice_unittest.dir/rcdevice_unittest.cc.o CMakeFiles/rcdevice_unittest.dir/__/__/main/common/bitarray.c.o CMakeFiles/rcdevice_unittest.dir/__/__/main/common/crc.c.o CMakeFiles/rcdevice_unittest.dir/__/__/main/io/rcdevice.c.o CMakeFiles/rcdevice_unittest.dir/__/__/main/io/rcdevice_cam.c.o CMakeFiles/rcdevice_unittest.dir/__/__/main/fc/rc_modes.c.o CMakeFiles/rcdevice_unittest.dir/__/__/main/common/maths.c.o CMakeFiles/rcdevice_unittest.dir/rcdevice_unittest_gen/settings_generated.c.o -o rcdevice_unittest  ../../../lib/libgtest_main.a ../../../lib/libgtest.a
